name: TestGetWaitPDUsTPUDPDstPort
title: TestGetWaitPDUsTPUDPDstPort
description: If a PDU was received via UDP that triggered the last wait function, with form 1 the UDP destination port can be requested.
Form 2 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: explicitJoinIndex
parameters.description: Number of the joined event corresponds with the return value of TestJoin....

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
